1:
A cursory look around the levin-blasted landscape confirms that if civilization has survived on the Ninth, it is not to be found near the crater that once was Alexandria. Sphene suggests nearby Treno, a port city–state and hub of trade on the continent, as a likely location of survivors. However, due to the violent lightning storm that spans as far as the eye can see, the airship cannot make the journey. Though Clerk PX-0093 remains on standby should you need to fly back to Living Memory, henceforth, you must walk.

※In the event that you leave the area, you may returnby speaking with Clerk PX-0061 at leynode mnemo.

Sphene suggests nearby Treno, a port city–state and hub of trade on the continent, as a likely location of survivors. 83: That must be Lumull. Heavens, I can smell the herbal aroma from here...
You may now use mounts within Treno.

84: None of the locals we've passed appear terribly distressed. As Sphene surmised, incursions must be a common occurrence.
That must be Lumull. Heavens, I can smell the herbal aroma from here...

85: Why, if it isn't our new friends! Thanks again for making short work of our foes.
None of the locals we've passed appear terribly distressed. As Sphene surmised, incursions must be a common occurrence.

86: If you've gone to the trouble of seeking me out, I can only assume it's for good reason!
Why, if it isn't our new friends! Thanks again for making short work of our foes.

87: <Emphasis>You</Emphasis> want to help <Emphasis>me</Emphasis>? Odd, but I'll consider it. Before anything else, though...
If you've gone to the trouble of seeking me out, I can only assume it's for good reason!

88: I must insist you drink our signature remedy, Sleepless Rhapsody! Everyone's a fan.
<Emphasis>You</Emphasis> want to help <Emphasis>me</Emphasis>? Odd, but I'll consider it. Before anything else, though...

89: You may find it the teensiest touch too sour for your tastes, but it'll set you aright. Just tip it down your throat...
I must insist you drink our signature remedy, Sleepless Rhapsody! Everyone's a fan.

90: Is this custom meant to raise the townsfolk's spirits after a trying event? Does it serve some ritual function?
You may find it the teensiest touch too sour for your tastes, but it'll set you aright. Just tip it down your throat...

91: He seems awfully keen on our partaking...
Is this custom meant to raise the townsfolk's spirits after a trying event? Does it serve some ritual function?

92: Surely we can survive a simple beverage. Surely...
He seems awfully keen on our partaking...

93: It won't hurt, you have my word. But since it's your first cup, maybe don't stray too far before you drink it.
Surely we can survive a simple beverage. Surely...

94: Oh, and don't turn your back! For...best results, you understand.
It won't hurt, you have my word. But since it's your first cup, maybe don't stray too far before you drink it.

95: It would seem you have no recourse but to drink the remedy whilst Lumull stands as witness...
Oh, and don't turn your back! For...best results, you understand.

96: I see how drinking that would be...unifying. And it is impressive that they have maintained the tradition here, so far from the Milalla's native lands.
It would seem you have no recourse but to drink the remedy whilst Lumull stands as witness...

97: Given its ability to counteract lightning's influence on the body, that remedy could be of use to the people of Alexandria as well. I am certain Lumull would be more than happy to offer it to them...
I see how drinking that would be...unifying. And it is impressive that they have maintained the tradition here, so far from the Milalla's native lands.

98: <gasp> ...I forgot to introduce myself, didn't I?
Given its ability to counteract lightning's influence on the body, that remedy could be of use to the people of Alexandria as well. I am certain Lumull would be more than happy to offer it to them...

99: Well, I'm Lumull. That was me announcing our victory earlier. And since Grandmother sent you to help with repairs, you'll know I'm her grandson.
<gasp> ...I forgot to introduce myself, didn't I?

100: I'm in charge of resolving any problems the people of Treno may have. My favorite kinds of work include taste-testing menu items, carrying medium-sized objects, searching for lost possessions of immense value...
Well, I'm Lumull. That was me announcing our victory earlier. And since Grandmother sent you to help with repairs, you'll know I'm her grandson.

101: Oh! And it's a pleasure to make your acquaintance.

I'm in charge of resolving any problems the people of Treno may have. My favorite kinds of work include taste-testing menu items, carrying medium-sized objects, searching for lost possessions of immense value...

102: You may now enter Mistwake with a party of NPC avatars. To make use of this feature, open the <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Trust<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> interface located under <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Duty<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> in the main menu.
Oh! And it's a pleasure to make your acquaintance.
